messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Design a bold PowerPoint presentation for store managers in the Retail industry forecasting holiday sales performance, containing exactly 15 slides with a festive theme using red, black, and gold colors. The output filename must be "Holiday_Sales_Forecast.pptx". Write all presentation content in English and use 16:9 Widescreen orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping; generate all data locally based on standard retail forecasting models. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# --- Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

COLOR_RED = RGBColor(196, 30, 58)
COLOR_BLACK = RGBColor(13, 13, 13)
COLOR_GOLD = RGBColor(255, 215, 0)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(43, 43, 43)
COLOR_LIGHT_GOLD = RGBColor(255, 248, 220)
COLOR_CARD_BG = RGBColor(26, 26, 26)
COLOR_ACCENT_RED = RGBColor(180, 27, 49)

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color=COLOR_BLACK):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=COLOR_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=12, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.65), body, font_size=10, color=COLOR_WHITE)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.4), text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=15):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.3), f"Holiday Sales Forecast | {page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=RGBColor(128, 128, 128), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)


def add_decorative_line(slide, left, top, width, color=COLOR_RED):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.04))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    return line_shape


def add_gold_accent_bar(slide, left, top, width):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.06))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
    return bar


def add_bullet_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=12, color=COLOR_WHITE):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = color
        run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return txBox


# --- Slide Builders ---

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    add_gold_accent_bar(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.8), Inches(10.3))
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.0), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.2), "Holiday Sales Forecast", font_size=44, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(6.3), COLOR_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.6), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.8), "FY 2024 Holiday Season Performance Analysis & Outlook", font_size=18, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.0), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Retail Division — Prepared for Store Managers", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(180, 180, 180), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.7), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.5), "November – December 2024", font_size=13, color=COLOR_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Agenda"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Agenda", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    agenda_items = [
        ("01", "Executive Summary"),
        ("02", "Market Overview & Historical Trends"),
        ("03", "Current Year Performance"),
        ("04", "Category & Channel Analysis"),
        ("05", "Regional Insights & Inventory Planning"),
        ("06", "Staffing Forecast & Promotional Calendar"),
        ("07", "Risk Factors & Action Items"),
    ]

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(agenda_items):
        y = Inches(1.4) + Inches(i * 0.75)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), num, font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.3), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(4), Inches(0.5), label, font_size=16, color=COLOR_WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def build_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Executive Summary", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    metrics = [
        ("Projected Revenue", "$48.2M", "Target: $50M"),
        ("YoY Growth", "+12.3%", "vs. Holiday 2023"),
        ("Foot Traffic", "+8.7%", "In-store visits"),
        ("Online Sales", "+18.5%", "E-commerce growth"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.9)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_width - 3 * gap) / 2

    for i, (title, value, subtitle) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.5)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(1.8), title=title, body=f"{value}\n{subtitle}", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=COLOR_GOLD)

    summary_text = "The 2024 holiday season is projected to deliver strong performance driven by early promotional activity and robust consumer spending across key categories."
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.6), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.5), summary_text, font_size=13, color=RGBColor(200, 200, 200))

    key_points = [
        "Strong Q4 consumer confidence supports higher basket sizes",
        "Early Black Friday promotions driving incremental traffic",
        "Online channel continues to outpace in-store growth",
        "Inventory levels well-positioned for peak demand periods"
    ]
    add_bullet_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.2), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.8), key_points)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def build_market_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Market Overview"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Market Overview", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    overview_items = [
        ("Consumer Confidence Index", "Rising 4.2% from Q3 to Q4"),
        ("Holiday Spending Intent", "$980B projected national spend"),
        ("Inflation Impact", "Moderating — 3.1% YoY CPI"),
        ("Gift Card Sales", "+15% vs. prior year"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(overview_items):
        y = Inches(1.4) + Inches(i * 0.9)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(3), Inches(0.35), label, font_size=14, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(8), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=13, color=COLOR_WHITE)

    insight_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.2), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.6))
    insight_box.fill.solid()
    insight_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_CARD_BG
    insight_box.line.color.rgb = COLOR_RED
    insight_box.line.width = Pt(2)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), Inches(5.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2 - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.3), "Key Insight: Consumer spending patterns show a shift toward experiential gifts and premium categories. Electronics, apparel, and home goods remain top performers with strong margin profiles.", font_size=12, color=COLOR_WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def build_historical_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Historical Sales Trends"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Historical Sales Trends", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Oct", "Nov 1-10", "Nov 11-20", "Nov 21-30", "Dec 1-10", "Dec 11-20", "Dec 21-31"]
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2022 ($M)", (6.8, 9.2, 11.5, 7.4, 5.9, 8.1, 10.3))
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2023 ($M)", (7.5, 10.1, 13.2, 8.6, 6.8, 9.4, 11.8))
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2024 Forecast ($M)", (8.1, 11.3, 15.0, 9.8, 7.5, 10.6, 13.2))

    left = Inches(0.8)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(11.7)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True

    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.line.width = Pt(2.5)
        if "FY 2024" in series.name:
            series.format.line.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        elif "FY 2023" in series.name:
            series.format.line.color.rgb = COLOR_RED
        else:
            series.format.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(150, 150, 150)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(6.2), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.7), "3-Year Holiday Season Comparison — Strong upward trajectory with accelerating growth in peak weeks", font_size=11, color=RGBColor(180, 180, 180))
    add_footer(slide, 5)


def build_current_year_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Current Year Performance"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Current Year Performance", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Oct", "Nov 1-10", "Nov 11-20", "Nov 21-30", "Dec 1-10", "Dec 11-20", "Dec 21-31"]
    chart_data.add_series("Actual ($M)", (8.1, 11.3, 15.0, None, None, None, None))
    chart_data.add_series("Forecast ($M)", (8.1, 11.3, 15.0, 9.8, 7.5, 10.6, 13.2))

    left = Inches(0.8)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(11.7)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]

    for series in plot.series:
        if "Actual" in series.name:
            series.format.fill.solid()
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        else:
            series.format.fill.solid()
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_RED

    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(6.2), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.7), "Actuals through Nov 20 — On track to exceed FY 2023 holiday performance by 8%", font_size=11, color=RGBColor(180, 180, 180))
    add_footer(slide, 6)


def build_category_breakdown(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Category Breakdown"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Category Breakdown", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Electronics", "Apparel", "Home & Garden", "Toys", "Beauty", "Gift Cards"]
    chart_data.add_series("Revenue Share (%)", (30, 24, 16, 14, 8, 8))

    left = Inches(0.5)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(5.5)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    for i, point in enumerate(chart.series[0].points):
        colors = [COLOR_GOLD, COLOR_RED, RGBColor(255, 165, 0), RGBColor(200, 100, 50), RGBColor(180, 50, 50), RGBColor(230, 200, 100)]
        if i < len(colors):
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[i]

    categories_detail = [
        ("Electronics (30%)", "TVs, headphones, gaming consoles — highest revenue driver"),
        ("Apparel (24%)", "Winter coats, accessories, formal wear for holiday events"),
        ("Home & Garden (16%)", "Decorations, kitchen appliances, bedding sets"),
        ("Toys (14%)", "Educational toys, board games, outdoor play items"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.5)
    for label, desc in categories_detail:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), y, Inches(2.8), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=12, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(3.8), Inches(0.6), desc, font_size=10, color=RGBColor(200, 200, 200))
        y += Inches(0.7)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def build_channel_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Channel Analysis"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Channel Analysis", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Oct", "Nov 1-10", "Nov 11-20", "Nov 21-30", "Dec 1-10", "Dec 11-20", "Dec 21-31"]
    chart_data.add_series("In-Store ($M)", (4.5, 6.8, 9.2, 5.8, 4.2, 5.9, 7.5))
    chart_data.add_series("Online ($M)", (3.6, 4.5, 5.8, 4.0, 3.3, 4.7, 5.7))

    left = Inches(0.8)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(11.7)
    height = Inches(4.2)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_STACKED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]

    for series in plot.series:
        if "In-Store" in series.name:
            series.format.fill.solid()
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_RED
        else:
            series.format.fill.solid()
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD

    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    channel_insights = [
        "In-store remains the dominant channel at 57% of total holiday revenue",
        "Online sales growing faster YoY (+18.5%) but smaller base",
        "BOPIS (Buy Online, Pick Up In-Store) up 32% — key growth driver",
        "Mobile commerce accounts for 45% of all online transactions"
    ]

    y = Inches(5.9)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.3), "Channel Insights:", font_size=13, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    for i, insight in enumerate(channel_insights):
        add_bullet_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.45) + Inches(i * 0.28), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2 - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), [insight])

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def build_regional_insights(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Regional Insights"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Regional Insights", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    regions = [
        ("Northeast", "$14.8M", "+10.2%", "Strong urban traffic; high gift card redemption"),
        ("Southeast", "$9.6M", "+14.7%", "Highest YoY growth; warm weather driving apparel sales"),
        ("Midwest", "$8.3M", "+8.5%", "Steady performance; home goods category leader"),
        ("West Coast", "$10.2M", "+11.9%", "Online channel outperforming in-store by 6%"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.9)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_width - 3 * gap) / 2

    for i, (region, revenue, growth, insight) in enumerate(regions):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.5)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(2.8), title=region, body=f"Revenue: {revenue}\nGrowth: {growth}\n{insight}", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=COLOR_GOLD)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.6), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.3), "Regional Performance Summary", font_size=14, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_bullet_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), Inches(5.0), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2 - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), [
        "Southeast region showing strongest momentum — consider reallocating inventory",
        "Northeast stores need additional staffing for peak holiday weeks",
        "West Coast online fulfillment centers operating at 94% capacity"
    ])

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def build_inventory_planning(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Inventory Planning"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Inventory Planning", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    inventory_items = [
        ("Current Stock Levels", "94% of target — adequate for peak demand"),
        ("Turnover Rate", "6.8x annualized — healthy velocity"),
        ("Backorder Risk", "Low — 3% of SKUs at risk of stockout"),
        ("Replenishment Cycle", "7-day cycle; next shipment Dec 15"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(inventory_items):
        y = Inches(1.4) + Inches(i * 0.85)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(3), Inches(0.35), label, font_size=14, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(9), Inches(0.6), value, font_size=13, color=COLOR_WHITE)

    alert_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.8), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.9))
    alert_box.fill.solid()
    alert_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_CARD_BG
    alert_box.line.color.rgb = COLOR_RED
    alert_box.line.width = Pt(2)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), Inches(5.0), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2 - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5), "Inventory Alerts & Recommendations:\n\n• Electronics category: Monitor stock levels for gaming consoles and smart home devices — demand exceeding projections by 12%\n• Apparel: Winter coats selling 23% faster than forecast; expedite Q4 replenishment orders\n• Gift Cards: Pre-holiday sales up 15%; ensure adequate POS terminal capacity", font_size=12, color=COLOR_WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def build_staffing_forecast(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Staffing Forecast"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Staffing Forecast", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    staffing_data = [
        ("Regular Staff", "85%", "Baseline operations"),
        ("Seasonal Hires", "+35%", "Peak period coverage"),
        ("Cashiers Needed", "+40%", "Reduced checkout wait times"),
        ("Floor Associates", "+25%", "Customer assistance & stocking"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value, desc) in enumerate(staffing_data):
        y = Inches(1.4) + Inches(i * 0.85)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(3), Inches(0.35), label, font_size=14, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_RED)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.8), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(7), Inches(0.35), desc, font_size=12, color=RGBColor(200, 200, 200))

    staffing_chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    staffing_chart_data.categories = ["Week 46", "Week 47", "Week 48", "Week 49", "Week 50", "Week 51"]
    staffing_chart_data.add_series("Staff Count", (120, 135, 155, 175, 165, 145))

    left = Inches(0.8)
    top = Inches(4.9)
    width = Inches(11.7)
    height = Inches(2.0)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, staffing_chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.fill.solid()
        series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD

    chart.has_legend = False

    add_footer(slide, 11)


def build_promotional_calendar(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Promotional Calendar"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Promotional Calendar", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    promotions = [
        ("Oct 15-31", "Early Bird Deals", "-10% select electronics"),
        ("Nov 1-10", "Thanksgiving Preview", "Home & garden specials"),
        ("Nov 11-17", "Black Friday Week", "Doorbusters + BOGO offers"),
        ("Nov 28-Dec 4", "Cyber Week", "Online-exclusive bundles"),
        ("Dec 5-14", "Gift Guide Launch", "Curated gift sets & cards"),
        ("Dec 15-31", "Last-Minute Rush", "Extended returns + express shipping"),
    ]

    for i, (date_range, event, offer) in enumerate(promotions):
        y = Inches(1.4) + Inches(i * 0.82)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(2), Inches(0.35), date_range, font_size=12, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(3), Inches(0.35), event, font_size=14, bold=True, color=COLOR_WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.3), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(7.5), Inches(0.35), offer, font_size=12, color=RGBColor(200, 200, 200))

    promo_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(6.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.35))
    promo_bar.fill.solid()
    promo_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_RED
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), Inches(6.42), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2 - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.35), "PROMOTIONAL CALENDAR — All stores must align pricing and signage to corporate calendar", font_size=11, bold=True, color=COLOR_WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 12)


def build_risk_factors(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Risk Factors"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Risk Factors", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    risks = [
        ("Supply Chain Disruption", "HIGH", "Weather events may delay shipments"),
        ("Labor Shortage", "MEDIUM", "Seasonal hiring lag in key markets"),
        ("Competitor Pricing", "MEDIUM", "Aggressive promotions from online retailers"),
        ("Inventory Stockout", "LOW", "3% of SKUs at risk — mitigation plan active"),
        ("Weather Impact", "HIGH", "Northeast winter storm forecast for Dec 20-25"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(4.0)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_width - gap) / 2

    for i, (risk, level, desc) in enumerate(risks):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.4) + row * Inches(1.85)

        risk_color = COLOR_RED if level == "HIGH" else RGBColor(230, 160, 50) if level == "MEDIUM" else COLOR_GOLD
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(1.7), title=f"{risk} — {level}", body=desc, bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=risk_color)

    mitigation_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.2), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.6))
    mitigation_box.fill.solid()
    mitigation_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_CARD_BG
    mitigation_box.line.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
    mitigation_box.line.width = Pt(2)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), Inches(5.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2 - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.3), "Mitigation Strategy: Cross-training staff across departments, establishing backup supplier agreements for top 20 SKUs, and implementing dynamic pricing triggers for competitive response.", font_size=12, color=COLOR_WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 13)


def build_action_items(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Action Items"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Action Items", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    actions = [
        ("Immediate (This Week)", [
            "Confirm seasonal staffing schedules for all locations",
            "Review and adjust inventory orders for top 50 SKUs",
            "Update promotional signage per corporate calendar"
        ]),
        ("Short-Term (Next 2 Weeks)", [
            "Execute Black Friday doorbuster promotions",
            "Launch Cyber Week online-exclusive bundles",
            "Monitor competitor pricing and adjust accordingly"
        ]),
        ("Ongoing Through December", [
            "Daily sales tracking against daily targets",
            "Weekly inventory replenishment reviews",
            "Customer feedback collection for service improvements"
        ]),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.4)
    for section_title, items in actions:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.35), section_title, font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
        y += Inches(0.4)

        for item in items:
            add_bullet_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), y, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2 - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.35), [item])
            y += Inches(0.4)

        y += Inches(0.15)

    add_footer(slide, 14)


def build_closing_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    add_gold_accent_bar(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.8), Inches(10.3))

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Thank You"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(44)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.0), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.2), "Thank You", font_size=44, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(6.3), COLOR_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.6), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.8), "Let's Make This Our Best Holiday Season Yet", font_size=18, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    contact_items = [
        ("Retail Division — Sales Planning Team"),
        ("Questions? Contact: sales.planning@retailcorp.com"),
        ("Next Review Meeting: December 5, 2024"),
    ]

    for i, item in enumerate(contact_items):
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.8) + Inches(i * 0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.35), item, font_size=13, color=RGBColor(180, 180, 180), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 15)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_agenda_slide(prs)
    build_executive_summary(prs)
    build_market_overview(prs)
    build_historical_trends(prs)
    build_current_year_performance(prs)
    build_category_breakdown(prs)
    build_channel_analysis(prs)
    build_regional_insights(prs)
    build_inventory_planning(prs)
    build_staffing_forecast(prs)
    build_promotional_calendar(prs)
    build_risk_factors(prs)
    build_action_items(prs)
    build_closing_slide(prs)

    prs.save("Holiday_Sales_Forecast.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
